name: PM Awas Yojana (Gramin)
description: Housing scheme for rural poor to build pucca houses
benefit: Rs 1.2 lakh (plains) or Rs 1.3 lakh (hilly areas) for house construction
documents: Aadhaar, BPL card, bank account, land ownership proof

name: PM Jan Dhan Yojana
description: Zero balance bank account with insurance and overdraft
benefit: Free bank account, Rs 2 lakh accident insurance, Rs 30,000 life cover
documents: Aadhaar, PAN or any ID proof

name: PM Kisan Samman Nidhi
description: Direct income support for farmers
benefit: Rs 6,000 per year in 3 installments of Rs 2,000
documents: Aadhaar, land records, bank account

name: Pradhan Mantri Ujjwala Yojana
description: Free LPG connection for BPL women
benefit: Free LPG gas connection with first cylinder and stove
documents: BPL card, Aadhaar, ration card

name: Ayushman Bharat PM-JAY
description: Health insurance for poor and vulnerable families
benefit: Rs 5 lakh per year health coverage for secondary and tertiary care
documents: Aadhaar, ration card, SECC data enrolment

name: PM Matru Vandana Yojana
description: Maternity benefit for pregnant and lactating mothers
benefit: Rs 5,000 in 3 installments for first live birth
documents: MCP card, Aadhaar, bank account, marriage certificate

name: Sukanya Samriddhi Yojana
description: Savings scheme for girl child education and marriage
benefit: 8.2% interest rate, tax benefits under 80C, maturity at age 21
documents: Girl child birth certificate, parent Aadhaar, address proof

name: PM Fasal Bima Yojana
description: Crop insurance for farmers against natural calamities
benefit: Insurance coverage for crops lost to drought, flood, cyclone
documents: Land records, bank account, sowing certificate

name: MGNREGS (Mahatma Gandhi NREGS)
description: 100 days guaranteed wage employment in rural areas
benefit: 100 days of employment per year at minimum wage (Rs 200-350/day by state)
documents: Job card, Aadhaar, bank account

name: National Social Assistance Programme (NSAP)
description: Pension for elderly, widows, and disabled persons
benefit: Rs 200-500/month pension (varies by state top-up)
documents: Age proof, BPL certificate, Aadhaar, bank account

name: PM Shram Yogi Maandhan Yojana
description: Pension scheme for unorganised sector workers
benefit: Rs 3,000/month pension after age 60
documents: Aadhaar, mobile number, savings bank account

name: Atal Pension Yojana
description: Pension scheme for workers in unorganised sector
benefit: Guaranteed pension of Rs 1,000-5,000/month after age 60
documents: Savings bank account, Aadhaar, mobile number

name: PM SVANidhi (Street Vendor Loan)
description: Collateral-free working capital loan for street vendors
benefit: Rs 10,000 loan initially, up to Rs 50,000 on repayment
documents: Vending certificate or letter from ULB, Aadhaar, bank account

name: Mudra Yojana (Shishu)
description: Micro loan for small business and self-employment
benefit: Loan up to Rs 50,000 without collateral for small business
documents: Aadhaar, PAN, business plan, address proof

name: National Scholarship Portal (Pre-Matric)
description: Scholarship for SC/ST/OBC students in classes 1-10
benefit: Rs 1,000-2,500 per year scholarship
documents: School enrollment proof, caste certificate, income certificate, bank account

name: National Scholarship Portal (Post-Matric)
description: Scholarship for SC/ST/OBC students after class 10
benefit: Rs 5,000-12,000 per year including maintenance allowance
documents: Mark sheet class 10, caste certificate, income certificate, bank account

name: Beti Bachao Beti Padhao
description: Scheme for welfare and education of girl child
benefit: Awareness, education support, cash transfers in select states
documents: Girl child documents, parent Aadhaar

name: PM Kaushal Vikas Yojana (PMKVY)
description: Free skill training and certification for youth
benefit: Free skill training + Rs 8,000 reward on certification + job placement
documents: Aadhaar, educational certificates, bank account

name: Pradhan Mantri Garib Kalyan Anna Yojana
description: Free food grain for poor families
benefit: 5 kg free rice/wheat per person per month
documents: Ration card, Aadhaar

name: Janani Suraksha Yojana
description: Cash incentive for institutional delivery for BPL pregnant women
benefit: Rs 1,400 (rural) or Rs 1,000 (urban) on hospital delivery
documents: BPL card, ANC registration, Aadhaar, bank account

name: Deen Dayal Upadhyaya Grameen Kaushalya Yojana
description: Placement-linked skill training for rural youth
benefit: Free training + guaranteed job placement with minimum Rs 6,000/month salary
documents: Aadhaar, educational proof, address proof

name: Stand-Up India Scheme
description: Bank loans for SC/ST and women entrepreneurs
benefit: Rs 10 lakh to Rs 1 crore loan for greenfield enterprise
documents: Aadhaar, PAN, caste certificate, business plan, bank account

name: E-Shram Card Scheme
description: Universal account for unorganised workers with benefits
benefit: Rs 2 lakh accident insurance, priority access to social security schemes
documents: Aadhaar linked to mobile, bank account

name: PM Vishwakarma Yojana
description: Support for traditional artisans and craftsmen
benefit: Skill training + Rs 15,000 toolkit grant + Rs 3 lakh collateral-free loan
documents: Aadhaar, PM Vishwakarma registration, bank account

name: Antyodaya Anna Yojana
description: Subsidised food for poorest of the poor families
benefit: 35 kg food grain per month at Rs 2/kg wheat and Rs 3/kg rice
documents: Antyodaya ration card, Aadhaar
